titleStmt.title: SII 22.79: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 79. (A.R. No. 79 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: This is only an incomplete introduction of an inscription of Rājēndra-Chōḷa I beginning with the expression Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumanni vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum
poṟceyappāvaiyum cirtanicce
lviyum taṉ perunteviya
rāki Inpuṟa neṭuntuyar (ū)
ūḻiyuḷ Iṭai
tuṟaināṭum (tuṟaināṭum) tuṭarvanavelipaṭa
rvaṉavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻmatiḷkoḷḷi
ppāk
kamum Aṇaṟkkariyatu maṇṇaikkaṭak
kamum porukaṭal Iḻattaraiyan ṟan muṭiyum
Āṅkavaṉ ṟeviyarroṅkeḻil muṭiyum munna
vanpakkal ṟennavan vaitta cuntarar muṭiyum In
tiran Ārvamum teṇṭirai yiḻamaṇṭala muḻutum
Eṟipaṭaik keraḷan(ṉ) muṟaimaiyil cūṭum ku
l(ā)taṉa mākiya palarpukaḻ (m) muṭiyum ceṅkatirmālaiyum
caṅkatirvelait tol peruṅkāvi pala paḻantivu
ceruviṟ ciṉavi Irupattorukāl Araicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracu
rāman melvaruñ cāntimaṟ ṟiyvaraṇ karuti yiruttiya
cempoṟṟiruttakumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika mucaṅkiyuḷ mutu
kiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅ(ṅ)kan Aḷapperum pukaḻo
ṭum piṭiyali (i)raṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum
matura maṇṭalamum
nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñciṉavirar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭai paḻana mācuṇi tecamu
vaṇkirtti Ātinakaravaiyil cantiraṉ tolkulattu Intirairataṉai viḷaiamarkka
ṭum piṭittu palatanattoṭu niṟaikulatanakkuvaiyum kiṭṭarum ceṟimuṉai Oṭṭavi
nalkocalai nāṭum tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉai Aṭuttu vaṇṭuṟai colaitaṇṭapu
cūraṉai muraṇukattākki tikkaṉakirtti takkaṇalāṭamum toṭukaṭaṟ caṅkavoṭaṭal mayipālaṉai
kattañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittil neṭuṅkaṭal
veṟimalaṟ tirtta teṟipunaṟkaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuḷ palakalam celutti
caiyottuṅkapanmanākiya kaṭārattaraiyaṉai vākayamāka porukaṭal kumpak kariyoṭu makappaṭu
piṟakkiya peruneti piṟakkamum Ārttavan nakarp porttoḻil vācalil viccātira
ttoḷir puṉaimaṇipputavamum kanamaṇikkatavamum niraicirvicaiyamum tu
yum vaṉmalaiyūṟeiṟ ṟoṉmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻ cūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum kala
viṉai Ilaṅkācokamum kāppiṟu niṟaipunaṟ māppappāḷamu
puricai mevilipaṅkamumStops here.
Digital edition of SII 22.79 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
